creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->analyzed

This port's distfiles suck.  I updated the checksums on them, 
and got this: 

===>  Installing for diveintopython-2.6 
===>   Generating temporary packing list 
===>   Registering installation for diveintopython-2.6 
===>  Deinstalling for diveintopython-2.6 
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/share/doc/diveintopython/apihelper_fromimport.html' doesn't really exist 
pkg_delete: file `/usr/local/share/doc/diveintopython/fileinfo_multiassign.html' doesn't really exist 
pkg_delete: unable to completely remove directory '/usr/local/share/doc/diveintopython' 
pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list is 
incorrectly specified?) 
===>  Cleaning for diveintopython-2.6 

You really need to talk to the author(s) and get them to roll 
VERSIONED distfiles....
